description: Changing selectorLabels in a chart breaks the immutable Deployment selector on upgrade.
body: Failure mode: a chart edit changes the labels feeding a Deployment/StatefulSet selector, and because the selector is immutable the upgrade fails or forces a destructive recreate. Detection signals: helm upgrade errors about an immutable field, a manifest diff shows selector label changes, and pods get recreated unexpectedly. Do not alter selector labels on an existing release casually. Safer fallback: keep selectorLabels stable and separate from cosmetic labels via _helpers, diff manifests before upgrade, and if a selector must change, plan a controlled recreate as a human-gated production change.
